article_title: Liquor Primary licences may offer bottle service

briefs.title: Liquor Primary bars and nightclubs can now sell bottle service — no application needed
briefs.summary: BC Liquor Primary licensees (bars, nightclubs, and similar venues) can now sell full bottles of spirits as bottle service. The change is automatic — no application required.
briefs.action_required: Review and follow the bottle service rules: serving size limits, no sales in the last hour, and controlled pouring.
briefs.article_title: Liquor Primary licences may offer bottle service
